name: Avalara, Inc.
lede: Avalara runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Noida, covering it, built over twenty years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Avalara office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Avalara, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Avalara runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Noida), covering it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

titles.title: Vice President - Head Global Support Operations

about.description: Avalara's India footprint covers Pune and Noida, spanning it. The centers deliver IT, HR, Sales & Marketing and Customer Support for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Accounting and Tax Software, Industry-Specific Software

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 37 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Avalara operate in India?
faq.a: Avalara operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Avalara have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Avalara's India GCC footprint spans Pune and Noida.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Avalara run in India?
faq.a: Avalara runs it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Avalara's India GCCs?
faq.a: Avalara's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Avalara's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 37 leaders at Avalara's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
